theme.description: An exclusive, high-end 'dark academia' aesthetic that feels more like a private members club than a gamified dating app. The UI subverts standard colorful dating apps by relying on deep jewel tones, classic serif headings, and cinematic textures.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-headings tracking-tight leading-none text-white

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Mobile-first, generous spacing to let photography breathe. Profile cards should feel immersive and tactile.

patterns.profile_card: w-full aspect-[3/4] max-h-[75vh] relative rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl
patterns.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full h-20 bg-[#0B1320]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10 flex justify-around items-center px-6 z-50

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#060A11] px-8 py-4 font-body font-medium hover:bg-[#E6C65C] transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-white/5 text-white px-8 py-4 font-body border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors backdrop-blur-md
buttons.icon: rounded-full bg-white/10 p-4 text-white hover:bg-white/20 transition-all

inputs.text: w-full bg-[#0B1320] border-b border-white/20 text-white py-3 px-4 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D4AF37] transition-colors rounded-t-lg font-body placeholder-white/30
inputs.select: w-full bg-[#0B1320] border border-white/10 text-white rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] focus:border-[#D4AF37]

cards.base: bg-[#0B1320] rounded-2xl border border-white/10 p-6 shadow-lg
cards.glass: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6

badges.college: px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-[#8A1538]/20 text-[#8A1538] border border-[#8A1538]/30 text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wide
badges.major: px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-white/10 text-white/80 border border-white/10 text-xs font-medium

motion.swiping: Use framer-motion useTransform mapped to drag-x for rotation (-10deg to 10deg) and opacity out. Physics: stiffness 300, damping 20.
motion.page_transitions: Fade in with subtle 10px Y-axis translate. ease-out duration 0.4s.
motion.hover_states: Scale buttons up 1.02, slightly increase background lightness, drop shadow glow for primary actions.

ai_icebreaker.visuals: A shimmering tracing-beam border or a soft gold glow behind the 'Generate Icebreaker' button. Uses a magical sparkle icon.
ai_icebreaker.behavior: When clicked, shows a typing animation (staggered fade-in of words) referencing Claude Sonnet 4.5 capabilities subtly.

matching_algorithm.visuals: When a match occurs, background dims, two circular profile images slide together and intersect like a Venn diagram, glowing gold.

assets.icons: Use lucide-react with stroke-width 1.5 for a sleek, delicate look.

image_urls.description: Dark, moody Oxford architecture for the login screen.
Deep blue abstract texture for cards and backgrounds.
Mock profile picture: woman smiling with coffee.
Mock profile picture: grayscale photo of woman.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST include a descriptive data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='swipe-right-action').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI components but heavily override default styles to match the dark jewel/luxury aesthetic outlined in colors and components.
Implement the mobile app container to fill the screen with no horizontal scrolling. The bottom nav must be fixed.
Ensure the swipe cards stack perfectly in the center. Avoid placing them in standard 2D grids, they must overlap using absolute positioning or framer-motion stack.
Apply `backdrop-blur-xl` and dark transparent backgrounds (`bg-[#0B1320]/80`) for any floating panels or the nav bar.
DO NOT use Inter or Roboto. Use Cormorant Garamond for headings and Outfit for body. Load them via Google Fonts.
Use Lucide-React for all icons. Ensure they have a delicate look (stroke-width: 1.5).
Never use `target='_blank'` without `rel='noopener noreferrer'`. Always add `data-testid` to all clickable elements.
